samples.xml_description:
Implement a module of a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages. Clock input Active low reset signal Enable signal for addition operation 64-bit input operand A 64-bit input operand B 65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb. Output enable signal. Determines the bit width of adda and addb.

Implement the module behavior as follows:

Include a register for each pipeline stage.

Calculate the sum values for each pipeline stage using the input operands and carry values.

Update the output enable signal (o_en) based on the pipeline stages.
